title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Geodis India
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!
